mapper.sql: id, rule_name, rule_code, attack_type, risk_level, alert_level, threshold_count, threshold_window_seconds, suppress_duration_seconds, enabled, priority, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule ORDER BY priority ASC
SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC
SELECT FROM sys_alert_rule WHERE enabled = 1 AND (attack_type = #{attackType} OR attack_type IS NULL) ORDER BY priority ASC
